path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 24 - Sonic (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\01. Green Hill Zone.mp3
description: A classic! So uplifting and cool. Sega Mega Drive soundfont going crazy on this music.
title: Green Hill Zone
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 24: Sonic

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 24 - Sonic (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\02. Scrap Brain Zone.mp3
description: Cool that they added another track from the original game, this one is definitely one of the good ones, although the drum that comes in is off-time. I like the second section.
title: Scrap Brain Zone
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 24: Sonic

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 24 - Sonic (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\03. Emerald Hill Zone.mp3
description: Sonic 2 is my jam and I love this track. Would have loved more from this game but I'll take it. The amount of times I must have heard this music as a child. I remember playing this game over and over.
title: Emerald Hill Zone
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 24: Sonic

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 24 - Sonic (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\04. Sonic Boom.mp3
description: Sonic CD's soundtrack, especially the Japanese version, is so great. It's a shame nothing is here apart from the theme song from the American release. It is kinda catchy though.
title: Sonic Boom
composers: Spencer Nilsen, Pastiche, Bobby Vega, Brad Kaiser, Erik Frykman
contributors: Spencer Nilsen, Pastiche, Bobby Vega, Brad Kaiser, Erik Frykman
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 24: Sonic

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 24 - Sonic (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\05. Angel Island Zone.mp3
description: Smash is totally missing out on amazing remixes for Sonic!! How can this be? At least Jun Senoue was on it and made this incredible version of the first level from Sonic 3, one of my favourite Sonic games. Love that it has both Act 1 and 2 in there. It's great.
title: Angel Island Zone
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 24: Sonic

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 24 - Sonic (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\06. Super Sonic Racing.mp3
description: Sonic R has a hilarious and banging soundtrack. This is the title theme and its great. It's a lot of fun.
title: Super Sonic Racing
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 24: Sonic

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 24 - Sonic (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\07. Open Your Heart.mp3
description: Sonic Adventure angsty cheesy punk music does not do it for me in the slightest.
title: Open Your Heart
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 24: Sonic

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 24 - Sonic (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\08. Live & Learn.mp3
description: Hate it. So many smash players pick this because they are blinded by nostalgia.
title: Live & Learn
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 24: Sonic

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 24 - Sonic (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\09. Escape from the City.mp3
description: Listening to this singer makes me picture a certain type of teenager in my mind. Can't stand it.
title: Escape from the City
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 24: Sonic

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 24 - Sonic (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\10. Sonic Heroes.mp3
description: I hate it. Can't listen to it.
title: Sonic Heroes
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 24: Sonic

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 24 - Sonic (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\11. Right There, Ride On.mp3
description: I learned that this soundtrack did some uncleared sampling, which is why they've had to take down the soundtrack everywhere. A shame because it's great! This song is fun and there are many bangers on the rest of the OST.
title: Right There, Ride On
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 24: Sonic

filename: 12. His World (Theme of Sonic The Hedgehog - 2006 E3 Version).mp3

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 24 - Sonic (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\19. Lights, Camera, Action! (Studiopolis Zone Act 1).mp3
description: What a relief! They included something from one of the world's best video game soundtracks, Sonic Mania. Holy shit this track (and the whole OST) ist jamming. So good. This one is jazzy, cheeky and fun. Love it. This composer was originally a youtube who uploaded fan remixes of Sonic songs and now he works for Sega. Amazing.
title: Lights, Camera, Action! (Studiopolis Zone Act 1)
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 24: Sonic

path: music/smash\Super Smash Bros. Anthology Vol. 24 - Sonic (Wii, 3DS, Wii U, Switch) (gamerip) (2008)\20. Fist Bump.mp3
description: Sonic Forces was a steaming pile of garbage. It's got another song in it. Eugh.
title: Fist Bump
album: Super Smash Bros. Anthology - Vol. 24: Sonic
